name: Margaret Okafor
triageNote: 74F with fever, dysuria, and left flank pain x1 day, rigors this morning. Daughter reports mild confusion this AM (new for her). Hx recurrent UTIs including pyelonephritis admission 4/2026. On warfarin for mechanical mitral valve. T2DM, CKD. Acetaminophen 650 mg PO given at triage 10:55. Urine and blood cultures ordered.
